visual: Mirror of the left-side version — ward off, rollback, press, push — with weight shifting forward and back in a bow stance on the right side.
motion_description: The sequence begins with a step forward onto the right foot, shifting weight forward as the right forearm raises to chest level and the left hand rests near the right elbow. The weight then shifts smoothly back to the left leg as both arms sweep diagonally downward towards the left hip, rotating the torso to the left. Continuing the fluid motion, the weight rocks forward back into a right bow stance while the left hand presses outward against the right forearm, before the hands separate and retract toward the chest with another backward weight shift. The motion concludes with a final forward shift into the right bow stance as both palms steadily push straight outward at chest height.
